---
title: "01. 逍遥与尺度超越"
subtitle: "Free Wandering and Scale Transcendence"
date: 2026-04-11
order: 1
categories: [zhuangzi, cultural, omega]
description: "These chapters repeatedly insist that no single finite viewpoint exhausts the whole. That is structurally closest to the inverse-limit object X_∞, where identity is determined only by the compatible f..."
---

**Chapters:** 1, 17, 21, 32  
**Omega Directions:** `modular-tower-inverse-limit`, `dynamical-systems`, `spectral-theory`

{{< include articles/category_01_free_wandering_scale_transcendence.md >}}

---

## Infographic

![category_01_free_wandering_scale_transcendence Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_01_free_wandering_scale_transcendence_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_01_free_wandering_scale_transcendence_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_01_free_wandering_scale_transcendence_infographic.png)

---

[Back to Zhuangzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
